## Summary

Resizes the Reset Queue button to match the TrustedPath and Final Review buttons in size/style, and repositions it to the left of TrustedPath in the workbench header row.

## Scope

- `components/revision/ResetQueueButton.tsx` — matched button styling (same px-4 py-2, text-[12px], font-bold, uppercase, tracking, shadow-lg, border-[#C8A96E]) and confirmation dropdown matches TrustedPath's dropdown pattern
- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx` — moved from `fixed right-6 top-[120px]` to `fixed right-[640px] top-[78px]` (same row as TrustedPath/Final Review)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

None — pure styling change.
